nasb.text: Likewise for the north side in length there shall be hangings one hundred cubits long, and its twenty pillars with their twenty sockets of bronze; the hooks of the pillars and their bands shall be of silver.

esv.text: And likewise for its length on the north side there shall be hangings a hundred cubits long, its pillars twenty and their bases twenty, of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets shall be of silver.

cnv.text: 北面也是一樣，要有四十四公尺長的帷幔，帷幔的柱子二十根，銅插座二十個，柱子上的鉤子和桁子都是銀的。

ccb.text: 北面的帷幔也是长四十六米，柱子、铜底座、钩子、横杆的样式都与南面的一样。
